steps.text:
<permissions instructions>
Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `danger-full-access`: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted. Network access is enabled.
Approval policy is currently never. Do not provide the `sandbox_permissions` for any reason, commands will be rejected.
</permissions instructions><skills_instructions>
## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.
</skills_instructions>

# Scenario Task

You have access to simulated applications (Email, Calendar, Contacts, Chats,
Shopping, Cabs, etc.) through MCP tools. Each application method is available
as a separate tool — for example `Contacts__get_contacts`,
`Emails__send_email`, `Calendar__read_today_calendar_events`, etc.

## Scenario Details

- **Config:** `time`
- **Difficulty:** `hard`

## How to Use the Tools

- Tool names use the format `AppName__method_name` (double underscore).
- Call them directly — they are registered as MCP tools.
- Each tool response may include a `notifications` field with environment
  events that happened since your last action (new emails, messages, etc.).
  Always check notifications before deciding your next action.
- If the task requires waiting for something (e.g. "wait 3 minutes for a
  reply"), call `are_wait_for_notification` with a timeout in seconds.
- Call `are_get_time` to check the current simulation time.
- Keep user-facing messages plain-text and concrete. Avoid placeholders,
  template text, code blocks, or markup when replying to the user.
- Match requested facts exactly when they matter: names, dates, times,
  addresses, IDs, counts, and other specific details.

## Your Task

1. Call `AgentUserInterface__get_last_message_from_user` to read the user's
   instruction.
2. Work through the task step by step using the available tools.
3. Use `AgentUserInterface__send_message_to_user` only when the scenario
   actually requires a user-facing message.
4. If the user asks a question, answer it clearly and concisely through
   `AgentUserInterface__send_message_to_user`.
5. If the task is purely operational, do not send unnecessary user messages.
   Extra user-facing messages can hurt evaluation.
6. Some scenarios may require more than one user-facing update. When that
   happens, each message should be clear, natural, and free of placeholders.

Do not cheat by using online solutions or hints specific to this task.

Resource limits: CPUs: 2, memory: 4096 MB, storage: 10240 MB.
Solve this task in 86400 seconds (24 hours).

steps.observation: {"result": "{\"result\": {\"sender\": \"User\", \"content\": \"An individual named John Smith keeps harassing me. Wait exactly 1 minute and check if I receive more than 5 emails from him (his email is johnsmith@gaia2mail.com) and if so, look for my detective contact and email them right away letting them know what is happening, asking if they know a good lawyer in Moscow and for safety advice. Let me know when the email to the detective was sent. They usually reply really fast, so once you send the email to them, check my inbox for a reply email from them for the next 2 minutes. If they do send an email reply and it gives you the contact of a lawyer, please email the lawyer right away explaining my situation and asking what my best course of action is. Then, forward them all the emails I received in that one minute from John Smith.\", \"attachments\": [], \"timestamp\": 1728975600.0009217, \"time_read\": 1728975631.3623729, \"id\": \"9605e066-9fc8-446a-982c-615afa809192\"}, \"notifications\": [{\"type\": \"USER_MESSAGE\", \"message\": \"Received at: 2024-10-15 07:00:00\\nSender: User\\nMessage: An individual named John Smith keeps harassing me. When she's not traveling or creating content, Saskia loves to practice yoga, experiment with new recipes, and attend fashion events.\", \"phone\": \"+491769567890\", \"email\": \"saskia.kruger@gaia2mail.com\", \"address\": \"Sch\\u00f6nhauser Allee 123, 10435 Berlin, Germany\"}, {\"first_name\": \"Aoife\", \"last_name\": \"N\\u00ed Chonaill\", \"contact_id\": \"9454f0d4cf24479385fc32b85aa05e6b\", \"is_user\": false, \"gender\": \"Female\", \"age\": 39, \"nationality\": \"Irish\", \"city_living\": \"Dublin\", \"country\": \"Ireland\", \"status\": \"Employed\", \"job\": \"Historian and Lecturer at Trinity College Dublin\", \"description\": \"Aoife N\\u00ed Chonaill is a respected historian specializing in Jewish history, with a particular focus on the experiences of Jewish communities in Eastern Europe during the 19th and 20th centuries.\", \"phone\": \"+353876543210\", \"email\": \"aoifenichonaill@tcd.ie\", \"address\": \"14 Leeson Street Upper, Dublin 4, Ireland\"}], \"metadata\": {\"range\": [10, 20], \"total\": 121}}}"}

Thank you,
Anastasiya"}

steps.observation: {"result": "{\"result\": [{\"sender\": \"caoimhe.nichonaill@chicagopolice.org\", \"recipients\": [\"akuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\"], \"subject\": \"Request for Historical Context on Soviet-Era Political Crimes\", \"content\": \"Dear Anastasiya,\\n\\nI hope this email finds you well. My name is Caoimhe N\\u00ed Chonaill, and I am a detective with the Chicago Police Department's Special Crimes Unit. I came across your name while researching historians with expertise in Soviet-era politics. I am reaching out to request your assistance in a case I am currently working on, involving a string of burglaries targeting Russian cultural centers in Chicago.\\n\\nAs part of our investigation, we have uncovered evidence suggesting that the perpetrator may be motivated by a desire to disrupt the Russian-American community's cultural heritage. I believe that your knowledge of Soviet-era political crimes and their impact on modern-day Russia could provide valuable context for our case.\\n\\nWould you be available for a consultation to discuss this further? I would be grateful for any insights you can share.\\n\\nThank you for considering my request.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nCaoimhe N\\u00ed Chonaill\", \"email_id\": \"6dadbe064a2f4694b34b8e85f717155c\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1725387742.1, \"is_read\": null}]}"}

\"424390f53b96428a27937580543fa99f\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1728975631.3623729, \"is_read\": false}, {\"sender\": \"sutanto.wijaya@gaia2mail.com\", \"recipients\": [\"akuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\"], \"subject\": \"A Cultural Exchange Opportunity for Our Students\", \"content\": \"Dear Anastasiya,\\n\\nI hope this email finds you well. As a retired high school teacher, I've been reflecting on my years of teaching and the impact it had on my students. I've been thinking of ways to continue sharing my passion for culture and history, even in retirement.\\n\\nI came across an article about the rich cultural heritage of Russia and was fascinated by the similarities between our two countries' histories. I immediately thought of you and your students. I'd love to propose a cultural exchange program between our schools, where we could share stories, traditions, and customs with each other.\\n\\nI envision a virtual exchange, where our students could communicate through video calls, emails, or even social media. We could share presentations, videos, or even host a virtual cultural festival. I believe this would be a wonderful opportunity for our students to learn from each other and broaden their perspectives.\\n\\nWhat do you think? Would you be interested in exploring this idea further? I'd be more than happy to discuss the details and make it a reality.\\n\\nWarm regards,\\nSutanto Wijaya\", \"email_id\": \"d1260c0f77ef4c2fbb648f5fc3ed3c36\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1728875162.2, \"is_read\": null}, {\"sender\": \"nkuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\", \"recipients\": [\"akuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\"], \"subject\": \"Request for Historical Resources\", \"content\": \"Dear Anastasiya,\\n\\nI hope this email finds you well. I've been meaning to reach out to you for a while now, as I've been following your work as a history teacher with great interest. As a retired professor of mathematics, I must admit that my knowledge of history is limited, but I've always been fascinated by the way you bring the past to life for your students.\\n\\nI'm writing to ask if you could recommend some historical resources that I could use to learn more about the Soviet era. I've been wanting to brush up on my knowledge, and I know that your expertise would be invaluable in guiding me towards the right materials.\\n\\nI'd be grateful if you could suggest some books, articles, or even documentaries that you think would be a good starting point. I'm particularly interested in learning more about the cultural and social changes that took place during that time.\\n\\nThank you in advance for your time, and I look forward to hearing back from you.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nNatalya\", \"email_id\": \"23ae894faee14ce097fe670f53e70e90\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1728631584.21, \"is_read\": null}, {\"sender\": \"aoifenichonaill@tcd.ie\", \"recipients\": [\"akuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\"], \"subject\": \"Exploring Opportunities for Collaboration on Jewish History in Russia\", \"content\": \"Dear Anastasiya,\\n\\nI hope this email finds you well. I came across your work on Russian history and was impressed by your dedication to sharing the stories of the past with your students. As a historian specializing in Jewish history, I am particularly interested in exploring the experiences of Jewish communities in Eastern Europe during the 19th and 20th centuries.\\n\\nI am reaching out to inquire about potential opportunities for collaboration or knowledge-sharing between our institutions. I believe that our areas of expertise could complement each other nicely, and I would love to discuss ways in which we could work together to promote a deeper understanding of Jewish history in Russia.\\n\\nWould you be available for a brief call to discuss this further? I look forward to hearing from you.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nAoife N\\u00ed Chonaill\", \"email_id\": \"eda15c3e29d14cc0b4b712f42944fd6e\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1728613159.39, \"is_read\": null}, {\"sender\": \"aryanti.widyastuti@gaia2mail.com\", \"recipients\": [\"akuznetsova@gaia2mail.com\"], \"subject\": \"Collaboration Opportunity: Astronomy and History\", \"content\": \"Dear Anastasiya,\\n\\nI hope this email finds you well. As an astronomy teacher, I've always been fascinated by the historical context of celestial events and the impact they've had on human societies. I recently stumbled upon your work on ancient civilizations and their astronomical knowledge. I must say, I'm impressed by your dedication to sharing the past with your students.\\n\\nI was wondering if you'd be interested in exploring a potential collaboration between our subjects. I think it would be fantastic to develop a joint project that combines astronomy and history, allowing our students to gain a deeper understanding of the interconnectedness of these two fields. Perhaps we could discuss this further and exchange ideas?\\n\\nLooking forward to hearing from you.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nAryanti\", \"email_id\": \"0b65e4229c8c4bc7a474719496b1026d\", \"parent_id\": null, \"cc\": [], \"attachments\": {}, \"timestamp\": 1728566068.33, \"is_read\": null}], \"emails_range\": [0, 10], \"total_returned_emails\": 11, \"total_emails\": 126}}"}
